Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Defendants Special Interrogatories, Set One And Requests For Production Of Documents, Set One And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-29-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANTS HILL & COMPANY PROPERTY MANAGEMENT INC., EDMOND BEDROSSIAN AND JASMINE BEDROSSIAN'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Defendants Special Interrogatories, Set One And Requests For Production Of Documents, Set One And Request For Sanctions IS TRANSFERRED, to be heard in department 501 at 9:30 a.m. on June 29, 2017. That department handles all landlord-tenant matters pursuant to SF Local Rule 8.10A1. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189 =302/hk

Defendant Hill & Co. Property Management Inc'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Defendant'S Special Interrogatories, Set One, And Requests For Production Of Documents, Set One And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-29-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Jessica Wilson (415-835-6777) of Bracamontes & Vlasak for Plaintiff/opposing party Erica Maybaum.
Melanie S. O'Brien (510-343-7997) of Kronenberg Law for Defendant/Moving party Hill & Co. Property Management Inc.

The Court announces its tentative ruling. Defendant ARGUED re: plaintiff's efforts to contact defendant for meet and confer and sanctions. Plaintiff submits to tentative ruling. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant Hill & Co. Property Management Inc'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Defendant'S Special Interrogatories, Set One, And Requests For Production Of Documents, Set One And Request For Sanctions is DENIED, insufficient meet and confer. Sanctions granted against Defendants in the amount of $2,100. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-31-2017 Set For Trial On Feb-13-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
